name: agent-buildprint

scripts.check:capabilities: node bin/agb.js packet check buildprints/api-key-management && node bin/agb.js packet check buildprints/rbac-permissions && node bin/agb.js packet check buildprints/stripe-subscriptions
scripts.check:packets: node bin/agb.js packet check buildprints/agentic-chat && node bin/agb.js packet check buildprints/ai-influencer-os && node bin/agb.js packet check buildprints/ai-shorts-video && node bin/agb.js packet check buildprints/automated-ai-blog-os && node bin/agb.js packet check buildprints/buildprint-mapper-os

description: CLI for bootstrapping Agent Buildprints for coding agents.
